clusters.justification: Captures the macro-level processing of emotional valence and physiological arousal driven by the coordinated activity of large-scale limbic and salience networks.
Represents the high-level computation of subjective utility, reward expectation, and motivated action selection characteristic of frontostriatal circuitry.
Encompasses the internally directed modeling of self, others, and interpersonal narratives intrinsically linked to the default mode network's functional topology.
